list.title: Integrations
list.description: Manage credentials, authentication status and capabilities of Sophos and Wazuh connections.
list.activeOrgFilterNote: Bulk actions and listing only consider integrations from the selected organization.
list.partnerBulkNote: Partner integrations cannot be deactivated in bulk — use the individual deactivate button to trigger the cascade.

emptyState.filteredTitle: No integrations match the applied filters
emptyState.filteredDescription: Adjust or clear the filters to see more results.
emptyState.title: No integrations found
emptyState.description: Create an integration to enable health, assets, alerts and queries per platform.

list.partialResultsDescription: Showing the first {{count}} — refine the filters to see more.

feedback.syncStarted: Sync started — updating tenants in the background.
feedback.syncInProgress: A sync is already in progress. Please wait for it to finish.
feedback.bulkDeactivatedWithWarnings: Bulk completed with warnings: {{deactivated}}/{{processed}} deactivated. {{errorCount}} item(s) skipped.

bulkDialog.title: Deactivate {{count}} integration(s)?
bulkDialog.description: This action marks the selected integrations as inactive. Collection jobs stop and the integration disappears from operational flows. Historical data is preserved.
bulkDialog.note: Already-inactive integrations are automatically skipped by the server. Partner integrations are blocked — use the individual flow to trigger the cascade.

deactivateDialog.title: Deactivate integration?
deactivateDialog.description: Integration {{name}} will be marked as inactive and removed from operational flows. Historical data is preserved.

cascadeDialog.title: Deactivate Partner with active tenants?
cascadeDialog.description: Integration {{name}} is a Sophos Partner with {{count}} active tenant(s). Confirming will deactivate (soft-delete) the Partner AND all child tenants. Historical data is preserved.

detail.inactiveDescription: This integration has been deactivated and cannot be used in operational flows until it is reactivated.
detail.viewTechnicalError: View technical error from last check
detail.overviewLoadError: Failed to load the integration overview.
detail.notFoundDescription: The requested integration does not exist or you do not have access to it.

licensedProducts.title: Licensed products
licensedProducts.none: No licensed products returned by the API.

detail.partialAlertsNotice: Showing the first {{count}} alerts. Use "View all in /alerts" to refine and see more.

maxWindow.label: Max window
maxWindow.description: Maximum period (in seconds) covered by a single query in this dialect.

rateLimit.label: Rate limit
rateLimit.description: Request limit declared by the platform for this dialect.

specKinds.label: Spec kinds
specKinds.description: Accepted statement formats: passthrough (literal) or sigma (automatic translation).

destinationsTab.previewDescription: Routing preview — the routes below match this integration and would send events to the indicated destinations. This is not a historical log; it is a simulation based on the routes' current conditions.
destinationsTab.emptyTitle: No routes found for this integration
destinationsTab.emptyDescription: Create routes with conditions that reference this integration to direct events to destinations.
destinationsTab.noDestinationsConfigured: No destinations configured on this route.

pushSource.title: Push source (edge-collector ingestion)
pushSource.intro: This source pushes events to CentralOps — there are no poll credentials.
pushSource.createHint: Create the integration and then, on the detail screen, issue the ingestion token and configure your edge-collector (Vector/OTel) pointing to POST /api/ingest/<stream>. Ready-made snippets for FortiGate (syslog) and Windows Event Log (WEC) are generated automatically.
pushSource.editHint: Manage the ingestion token and endpoint in this integration's ingestion tab.

sophos.clientSecretHelper: Leave blank to keep the current secret.
sophos.regionHelper: Optional. Automatically discovered on the first connection.
sophos.importNoticeBody: when saved, the Sophos Central API will be queried and all tenants under this credential will be automatically imported as separate Organizations + Integrations. Region and tenant_id are discovered per child — do not fill them in manually.

wazuh.indexerDescription: Source of alerts, detections and queries (wazuh-alerts-* indices). This is what feeds the pipeline.
wazuh.passwordHelper: Leave blank to keep the current password.
wazuh.managerDescription: Server health and agent inventory. Does not collect alerts/detections — enable only if you want this management data.

validation.nameRequired: Enter a name for the integration.
validation.wazuhIndexerUrlRequired: Wazuh requires an Indexer URL (source of alerts/detections).
validation.wazuhManagerUrlRequired: Enter the Manager URL or disable the Manager.

ingest.title: Push ingestion
ingest.bufferDepth: This source pushes events via an edge-collector. Current buffer: {{count}} event(s).
ingest.tokenWarningTitle: Copy it now — the token will not be shown again
ingest.tokenAlreadyIssued: A token has already been issued. Rotate it to generate a new one (invalidates the previous one).
ingest.revokeConfirm: Revoke the ingestion token? The edge-collector using it will immediately start receiving 401s. Use this if the token leaked.
ingest.revokeSuccess: Token revoked. No active token — issue a new one to resume ingestion.
